allowed_claim_sentence: Under HEADROOM_SEMANTIC_FIDELITY_D004, synthetic JSON tool output semantic gate did not satisfy the combined semantic-field and >=60% token-reduction gate.
claim_boundary: This card checks same-meaning preservation only through predeclared structured fields, not literal answer equality. It covers one local Ollama model and one synthetic fixture family; it does not generalize to all prompts, models, proxy deployments or CCR-enabled workflows.

environment.user_declared_hardware: MacBook Pro 16 inch, Apple M1 Pro, 16 GB

semantic_gate.decision_reason: The original baseline matched the semantic fields, but the compressed path did not preserve the same structured meaning under the gate.
semantic_gate.label: synthetic JSON tool output semantic gate
